description_long: This is a medium-sized, orange pumpkin with a rough, matte surface and a prominent, slightly twisted stem at the top. The pumpkin has been carved in a traditional jack-o'-lantern style, featuring two triangular eyes and a wide, jagged mouth with a toothy grin. The carving exposes the hollow interior, suggesting the pumpkin has been scooped out, and the cut edges are slightly irregular, adding to its hand-crafted appearance. The surface displays natural blemishes and color variations, with some lighter patches and subtle scarring. The back and sides of the pumpkin are uncarved, showing the natural, slightly flattened and asymmetrical form of the gourd. This pumpkin would typically be found as a seasonal decoration in urban environments, such as on porches, sidewalks, or near entryways during autumn.
description: A medium, orange jack-o'-lantern pumpkin with a rough, matte surface, carved with triangular eyes and a jagged mouth, and a prominent stem.
description_view_0: Front view showing the carved triangular eyes and wide, jagged mouth, with the stem clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view revealing one eye cutout and the depth of the carving, with the stem angled backward.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the uncarved, natural pumpkin surface and the full stem.
description_view_3: Back-side view showing the uncarved surface with some blemishes and the stem, with a partial glimpse of the mouth cutout.
attribute_carving_pattern: Traditional jack-o'-lantern style with two triangular eyes and a wide, jagged mouth forming a toothy grin. The cutouts are irregular and hand-crafted, with no additional motifs or etchings.
